latHint: Think cutting a small mark into a surface - not sheet music.
pivHint: Musicians read from the SCORE - but if you SCORE a piece of wood, what have you made in it?
winText: A small cut. SCORE was the pivot - sheet music to NOTCH a surface.
lossText: NOTCH - a small cut or mark. SCORE was the pivot: musical SCORE to scoring a NOTCH.
